current_session_substitute.scope: Use this Codex session as reviewer and judge; do not invoke external model CLIs.

live_findings.evidence: Installed app shows completed-thread follow-up user bubble and agent reply while composer still contains the sent text.
live_findings.verification: Installed app showed completed-thread transcript with composer empty and Send disabled after rebuild.

live_findings.evidence: Installed app shows a new running fallback thread and user bubble while composer still contains the sent prompt.
live_findings.verification: Live installed smoke showed new thread user bubble while composer cleared and Send disabled, then stayed clear after agent completion.

live_findings.evidence: User reported an Antigravity dev-server thread where the terminal asked a question but the GUI only showed a flickering broken chat bubble.
live_findings.verification: Regression tests prove observed Antigravity PostToolUse ask_question events now become waiting feedback with the question text and no generic completed-tool event.

live_findings.evidence: Waiting states with assistant text rendered as a generic approval row plus a separate pending assistant bubble.
live_findings.verification: Timeline selector regression test now renders one durable pending row containing the actual question.

live_findings.evidence: After rebuilding and launching the installed app, the app opened to the first-run workspace selector; the visible Fam-OS row did not navigate to chat, and New Agent produced a Janus Ideas already-exists toast.
live_findings.verification: pnpm run smoke:janus-workflow cannot reach Agent chat composer in the current installed profile.

non_ui_gate_notes.detail: Vitest portion passed 93 files / 748 tests, then direct-download artifact verification failed because release .dmg/.zip/checksum artifacts are absent.
Accessibility and screenshots are granted, but the installed profile currently restores to a first-run workspace selector with no reachable Agent chat composer.
